dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
My side hurt. It hurt so much here. Why am I here?
I'm sorry you're in so much pain. To get a better understanding of what's going on, could you please tell me exactly where on your side it hurts, and did the pain start suddenly or come on gradually?
What? It hurt. Right side. It hurt bad.
I understand, it sounds like the pain in your right side is quite severe. Do you have any known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors?
My side... it hurt. I don't know. Maybe no? I feel bad.
